title: draba ochroleuca
intro: Draba ochroleuca, also known as yellow whitlow grass or mountain whitlow grass, is a flowering plant species in the genus Draba. It is a low-growing perennial that produces yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. Draba ochroleuca can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in folk medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of colds and coughs.
